summary: Completed comprehensive restoration verification testing for Torado Group ERP (forked from torado60). Verified ALL portals and features after restoration. Backend: 100% pass rate (39/39 tests). Frontend: All major portals render correctly with data. Key restoration success: Owner Cockpit Cash Position is NON-ZERO (Rp 728.185.000, was Rp0 before), all feature datasets populated (customers 250, rewards 8, budgets 20, reservations 20, employees 20, payroll 15, leaves 50, fixed assets 32+, public content present). No white-screen crashes. App is fully functional end-to-end.
